name: Kiwix rag Wikipedia

specs.name: search_kiwix
specs.description: Search for general knowledge, history, or science definitions within the local Wikipedia Kiwix server.

query.description: The search keywords. Keep them concise and technically precise.

book.description: Optional. The EXACT ZIM book ID to search in. If you do not know the exact ZIM ID, you MUST leave this parameter empty/null.
